title: 23:03 ГўВҖВ” February 27, 2023
body_text:
23:03 ГўВҖВ” February 27, 2023
Update to Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications
We made the following changes to the Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327.
Document Library
Status
Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications
9327
Chapter 1, Wires Data Extract Service File Content
ГўВҖВў
We removed a paragraph that incorrectly stated the extract can contain all wires or only cross-border wires. The extract contains all wires.
ГўВҖВў
We added the note ГўВҖВңWires with a cross-border status of ГўВҖВҳVerify ManuallyГўВҖВҷ must be reviewed by your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs AML team.ГўВҖВқ
Revised
Chapter 4, Wires Data Extract Field Specifications
We updated the following field specifications:
ГўВҖВў
MTS Ref No ГўВҖВ“ Format, Length and Example columns
ГўВҖВў
Remittance Information ГўВҖВ“ Line 1 field length
ГўВҖВў
Sender FI to Receiver ГўВҖВ“ Line 1 field length
Chapter 5, Sample XML and Report File
We updated the MTS Ref No sample data to align with the updated format.
Questions
Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878,

support@central1.com
